contract.payment_cadence: by ordering period (annual, each February through January)
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Black Swift S0 sUAS Platforms: 150 units @ $18,000 (Period 1), 150 @ $18,630 (Period 2), 125 @ $19,282 (Period 3), 125 @ $19,957 (Period 4), 125 @ $20,655 (Period 5)
Mission Days Operational support: 30 days @ $2,850/day across all 5 periods; Operational and Testing Support: 6 sessions @ $6,000 across all 5 periods
Training: Operator and Observer Course 5 sessions @ $6,000; Instructor Training 5 sessions @ $600
Course Development: Operator and Observer Course Development and Instructor Training Course Development, 5 periods @ $6,000 each
Travel for Operational Support (NTE): $50,000 per ordering period × 5 periods
Non-recurring Engineering (NTE): Technical Documentation, Modeling, NHC workflow integration at $66,000 per line item × 5 periods
